sections.heading: About Comet Construction
body: Comet Construction, Inc. has been a family-owned and operated general contractor in Santa Rosa since 1983, remodeling kitchens, baths, and homes across Sonoma County. The company holds California general building contractor license #414519 (Class B) and works from its shop at 3011 Manning Court in Santa Rosa.

Over more than four decades, Comet Construction has focused on residential remodeling and additions — coordinating the trades, managing change orders in writing, and keeping projects on schedule and on budget. The company is a member of the Redwood Empire Remodelers Association and the North Coast Builders Exchange.
highlights: Licensed CA general building contractor (Lic. #414519, Class B)
Specializing in kitchens, baths, and home additions
Serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County

items.title: Kitchen Remodeling
items.description: Full kitchen renovations — cabinetry, counters, layout changes, and finishes — managed start to finish for Sonoma County homes.

items.title: Bathroom Remodeling
items.description: Bathroom updates and full remodels, from refreshed fixtures and tile to reconfigured layouts.

items.title: Home Additions
items.description: Room additions and expansions that add living space while matching the look and structure of your existing home.

items.title: General Remodeling
items.description: Whole-house and multi-room remodels for single-family homes, coordinating all of the specialized trades under one contractor.

items.title: Home Renovations
items.description: Renovations and improvements for established Sonoma County homes, with change orders written up and signed to avoid billing surprises.

items.title: New Construction
items.description: Single-family residential building backed by a California Class B general building license.

items.title: Reach out
items.body: Call or message Comet Construction and tell us what you need.

items.title: We do the work
items.body: Our team handles it properly, keeping you in the loop along the way.

items.title: You’re set
items.body: The job’s done right, and we stand behind it.

sections.heading: Work with Comet Construction
sections.body: Find us at 3011 Manning Ct. Call (707) 578-4506 — we’re glad to help.
